title: Grizzly Man
tagline: In nature, there are boundaries. One man spent the last thirteen years of his life crossing them.
overview: Follows the story of "Grizzly Man" Timothy Treadwell and what the thirteen summers in a National Park in Alaska were like in his attempt to protect the grizzly bears. The film is full of unique images and a look into the spirit of a man who sacrificed himself for nature.
